commit_scope: Align the Hostinger kernel-router canary with the promoted native attention route. The public /api/attention/kernel-runtime surface is now owned and proven by the BML front-door service, so the older production-manifest sibling uses a lightweight kernel_status listener probe while the BML canary continues to verify api_attention_kernel_runtime.

local_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27970739573 advanced public health to deployed_sha d11d67ac and public /api/attention/kernel-runtime returned 200 with X-Form-Router native-kernel and X-Form-Handler api_attention_kernel_runtime. The workflow failed because the older production-manifest kernel-router service was locally polled on the duplicate attention route until the listener budget expired.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.notes: A new Hostinger deploy must pass and public probes must confirm /api/health reports the new merge SHA while /api/attention/kernel-runtime is served by api_attention_kernel_runtime.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR checks, Hostinger deploy, and repeated public probes remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27970739573 rebuilt api, web, pulse, and both kernel-router services, and field-doc sync completed after the new running-state guard.
The same run failed when kernel-router listener probing /api/attention/kernel-runtime did not accept local HTTP within 90 seconds; logs showed the BML front-door sibling was healthy.

Public production after the failed run reported deployed_sha d11d67ac0da9bd1df337bde8efc17e3f15789afa and /api/attention/kernel-runtime returned 200 with native-kernel and api_attention_kernel_runtime.

The deploy script already has a BML deploy canary entry runtime-attention|/api/attention/kernel-runtime|api_attention_kernel_runtime, so this change moves only the older sibling listener probe off the promoted route.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Hostinger deploy should observe the production-manifest kernel-router with a lightweight native listener route and observe the promoted runtime attention surface through the BML front-door handler that actually owns public traffic.
test_flows: deploy script shell syntax validates locally.
static Hostinger deploy path checks continue to require the BML runtime attention canary handler.
post-merge Hostinger deploy passes and repeated public attention probes return X-Form-Handler api_attention_kernel_runtime.
